depends_on.context: When an Open Design read or run feeds a design decision, apply sk-interface-design's anti-default judgment before deciding

enhances.context: Reused Open Design tokens and components feed application code that sk-code governs, wires and verifies

siblings.context: Sibling terminal-driven design tool with a daemon model, gated mutating verbs, and an sk-interface-design handoff

intent_signals: drive open design from the terminal

trigger_phrases: drive open design from the terminal
key_topics: Open Design daemon and socket model
multi-turn generation (start_run plus discovery form) and gated verbs
od run verbs and od ui respond
HTTP API surface and ephemeral port rotation
derived.causal_summary: mcp-open-design teaches a terminal agent (opencode or Claude Code) to drive the installed Open Design desktop app through its od CLI and stdio MCP server instead of the in-app chat. Wire with od mcp install, then read local projects and design-systems, reuse them, or commission gated headless runs. Generation is multi-turn: start_run (or od run start) fires turn 1, which returns a discovery question-form with zero files, and the design is built only after od ui respond answers the form. od artifacts create only adds a file, never a rendered design. The od CLI is daemon-cli.mjs run under Node (not the bundled vela auth client) and the daemon is socket-discovered on an ephemeral port (not a fixed 7456), hosted by the desktop app, which also exposes an HTTP API whose port rotates on restart (rediscover via /api/mcp/install-info). Pairs with sk-interface-design (the design judgment) over the shared claude_design_parity loop, and never vendors Open Design content.
